current_commit_message: Add a settings file that matches the example in readme and tests
Re-add line to read newline and tab correctly
Update _get_settings_file func to handle when package is .egg-link file
Use requirements.txt in setup.py and update dev-setup.bash to pip install once
Update keywords and classifiers in setup.py
Update get_default_settings_file func to consistently find .egg-link dir
Update get_settings_file to find settings.ini in current working directory
Update module_name to be optional in get_settings_file, _get_config_object, and get_all_settings
Add keep_num_as_string kwarg to get_all_settings and settings_getter
Comment out setup_requires and test_require in setup.py
Update get_default_settings_file to detect __editable__ pth files
Update setup.py to list all tested Python versions
Update get_settings_file to check current directory for settings.ini first
